ast.name: title
ast.source: Seek in player. On mobile platform links open externally at this timestamp.
ast.target: 在播放器中定位。在移动平台上，链接将在此时间戳处外部打开。

ast.name: error
ast.source: forceFrameRate takes a positive int between 0 and 125, forcing frame rates higher than 125 fps is not supported
ast.target: forceFrameRate接受0到125之间的正整数，不支持强制帧率高于125 fps

ast.name: error
ast.source: Cannot read more than 32 bits at a time
ast.target: 无法一次读取超过32位的数据

ast.source: setting startPosition to 0 because media ended

ast.target: MSE 分离且视频已结束，重置起始位置

ast.source: MPEG audio found, not supported in this browser

ast.source: AC-3 audio found, not supported in this browser
ast.target: 发现 AC-3 音频，此浏览器不支持

ast.source: AC-3 audio found, not supported in this browser for now
ast.target: 发现 AC-3 音频，此浏览器目前不支持

ast.name: log
ast.target: 在 M2TS 中发现 HEVC

ast.name: log

ast.target: 无法为给定音频编解码器获取静音帧；改为复制最后一帧。

ast.name: log
ast.source: Alt audio track ahead of main track, seek to start of alt audio track
ast.target: 备用音频轨道领先于主轨道，跳转到备用音频轨道的起始位置

ast.name: log
ast.source: Switching audio track : flushing all audio
ast.target: 切换音频轨道：刷新所有音频

ast.name: log
ast.source: attachTransferred: waiting for SourceBuffer track info
ast.target: attachTransferred：等待 SourceBuffer 轨道信息

ast.name: log
ast.source: Blocking operation requested, but no SourceBuffers exist
ast.target: 请求了阻塞操作，但不存在 SourceBuffers

ast.name: log
ast.source: finished closing key sessions and clearing media keys
ast.target: 已完成关闭密钥会话并清除媒体密钥

ast.name: log
ast.source: roll_up but nrRollUpRows not set yet
ast.target: roll_up 但 nrRollUpRows 尚未设置

ast.name: log
ast.source: DER- Delete to End of Row

ast.name: log
ast.target: RDC - 恢复直接字幕显示

ast.name: log
ast.target: 尚未找到频道。文本模式？

ast.name: log
ast.target: 中间行解析中频道不匹配

ast.name: log
ast.source: [config]: Custom loader detected, cannot enable progressive streaming
ast.target: [config]：检测到自定义加载器，无法启用渐进式流式传输

ast.name: log
ast.target: [config]：已启用渐进式流式传输，使用 FetchLoader

ast.name: log
ast.source: Both AAC/HE-AAC audio found in levels; declaring level codec as HE-AAC
ast.target: 在级别中同时发现 AAC/HE-AAC 音频；将级别编解码器声明为 HE-AAC

ast.name: log
ast.source: Switching on main audio, use media.buffered to schedule main fragment loading
ast.target: 切换到主音频，使用 media.buffered 来安排主片段加载

ast.name: log
ast.source: Switching to main audio track, cancel main fragment load
ast.target: 切换到主音频轨道，取消主片段加载

ast.name: log
ast.source: Switching on alternate audio, use video.buffered to schedule main fragment loading
ast.target: 切换到备用音频，使用 video.buffered 来安排主片段加载

ast.name: log
ast.source: [playlist-loader]: audio codec signaled in quality level, but no embedded audio track signaled, create one
ast.target: [playlist-loader]：质量级别中发出了音频编解码器信号，但未发出嵌入式音频轨道信号，正在创建一个

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
This title will be printed after opening a video with the hotkey. Use
for new lines.
ast.target:
此标题将在使用快捷键打开视频后显示。使用
换行。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Pick a color for the url button.
ast.target: 为 URL 按钮选择颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Pick a color for the URL text button.
ast.target: 为 URL 文本按钮选择颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Pick a color for the timestamp button.
ast.target: 为时间戳按钮选择颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Pick a color for the timestamp text.
ast.target: 为时间戳文本选择颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This is the amount of seconds the video will seek forward when pressing the seek forward command.
ast.target: 这是按下快进命令时视频将向前跳转的秒数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This is the amount of seconds the video will seek backwards when pressing the seek backwards command.
ast.target: 这是按下快退命令时视频将向后跳转的秒数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Saved audio recordings will be written to this vault folder.
ast.target: 保存的音频录音将写入此保险库文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use {time} and {text} placeholders when inserting the active subtitle into your note.
ast.target: 在将活动字幕插入笔记时，使用 {time} 和 {text} 占位符。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show the current subtitle as an overlay on the video during playback.
ast.target: 在播放期间，将当前字幕作为叠加层显示在视频上。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show the scrollable subtitle list panel below the video.
ast.target: 在视频下方显示可滚动的字幕列表面板。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: On mobile, show a compact timestamp-only rail in the squeezed note pane when the media player opens.
ast.target: 在移动设备上，当媒体播放器打开时，在压缩的笔记窗格中显示紧凑的仅时间戳轨道。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add an expand button to mobile timestamp rail items so you can preview nearby note content without closing the player.
ast.target: 为移动设备时间戳轨道项目添加展开按钮，以便您无需关闭播放器即可预览附近的笔记内容。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Controls how timestamp blocks render when a #subhead is present. Old time-only blocks still work.
ast.target: 控制当存在 #subhead 时时间戳块的渲染方式。旧的仅时间块仍然有效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Controls text size for both video subtitle overlay and audio subtitle banner.
ast.target: 控制视频字幕叠加层和音频字幕横幅的文本大小。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How many times to repeat each subtitle segment. 'Infinite' loops until you move to another sentence.
ast.target: 每个字幕片段重复的次数。“无限”循环直到您移动到另一个句子。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Pause between each repeat of a subtitle segment.
ast.target: 字幕片段每次重复之间的暂停。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Imported subtitle files are saved to this vault folder so they sync across devices.
ast.target: 导入的字幕文件保存到此保险库文件夹，以便跨设备同步。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: One per line. Use `Title | URL` or just the RSS URL. These feeds appear in the right sidebar library.
ast.target: 每行一个。使用 `标题 | URL` 或仅 RSS URL。这些订阅源出现在右侧边栏库中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 逗号分隔的视频文件扩展名（不带点）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 逗号分隔的音频文件扩展名（不带点）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Try to resolve Bilibili video pages to direct browser-playable media before falling back to the embedded player.
ast.target: 尝试将 Bilibili 视频页面解析为可直接在浏览器播放的媒体，然后再回退到嵌入式播放器。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional. Stored locally in this plugin's data. Use only on your own device; cookies are sensitive login credentials.
ast.target: 可选。本地存储在此插件的数据中。仅在您自己的设备上使用；Cookie 是敏感的登录凭据。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, supported HTTP video page links use previously resolved yt-dlp direct URLs when the cached URL has not expired. Falls back when unavailable.
ast.target: 启用后，支持的 HTTP 视频页面链接在缓存的 URL 未过期时使用先前解析的 yt-dlp 直接 URL。不可用时回退。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Desktop only. Used by the command 'Resolve direct URL with yt-dlp'. Example: yt-dlp or C:\tools\yt-dlp.exe.
ast.target: 仅限桌面端。由命令“使用 yt-dlp 解析直接 URL”使用。示例：yt-dlp 或 C:\\tools\\yt-dlp.exe。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Preferred quality for resolved direct URLs. If unavailable, the command falls back to automatic format discovery.
ast.target: 解析直接 URL 的首选质量。如果不可用，该命令将回退到自动格式发现。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: One path per line. Supports vault folders and Windows folder paths. These folders appear in the right sidebar library.
ast.target: 每行一个路径。支持保险库文件夹和 Windows 文件夹路径。这些文件夹出现在右侧边栏库中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, clicking a Smart Media Library item also inserts the timestamp-url block and source line into the active markdown editor.
ast.target: 启用后，点击智能媒体库项目还会将时间戳-URL 块和源行插入到活动的 Markdown 编辑器中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When inserting a timestamp, also insert the corresponding subtitle text (useful for language learning).
ast.target: 插入时间戳时，同时插入相应的字幕文本（对语言学习有用）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Template for the subtitle line appended after the timestamp code block. Use {time} and {text} placeholders.
ast.target: 附加在时间戳代码块后的字幕行模板。使用 {time} 和 {text} 占位符。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 移动端时间戳笔记预览

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 实验性 Bilibili 直接播放

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 使用 yt-dlp 直接 URL 映射

ast.name: warn
ast.target: SIDX 包含分层引用（不支持）

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [mp4-demuxer]: Ignoring assumed invalid signed 64-bit track fragment decode time
ast.target: [mp4-demuxer]：忽略假定无效的有符号 64 位轨道片段解码时间

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Presentation time exceeds safe integer limit and wrapped to max safe integer in parsing emsg box
ast.target: 在解析 emsg 框时，呈现时间超过安全整数限制并被包装为最大安全整数

ast.name: warn
ast.source: HDCP policy resticted output with HDCP-LEVEL=NONE

ast.name: warn
ast.source: No matches on slow regex match for level playlist!
ast.target: 在慢速正则表达式匹配中未找到匹配项，针对级别播放列表！

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Fragment should have a positive duration
ast.target: 片段应具有正持续时间

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [level-helper] Previous playlist missing segments skipped in delta playlist
ast.target: [level-helper]：在增量播放列表中跳过了先前播放列表中缺失的片段

ast.name: warn
ast.target: 实时播放列表中没有片段

ast.name: warn
ast.target: 检测到音频，重新生成 InitSegment

ast.name: warn
ast.target: 检测到视频，重新生成 InitSegment

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Found irregular gaps in sample duration. Using PTS instead of DTS to determine MP4 sample duration.
ast.target: 在样本持续时间中发现不规则间隙。使用 PTS 而非 DTS 来确定 MP4 样本持续时间。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: initSegment does not contain moov or trak boxes.
ast.target: initSegment 不包含 moov 或 trak 框。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Duration parsed from mp4 should be greater than zero
ast.target: 从 mp4 解析的持续时间应大于零

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Audio track is undefined on fragment load progress
ast.target: 在片段加载进度中音频轨道未定义

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Audio track details undefined on fragment load progress
ast.target: 在片段加载进度中音频轨道详情未定义

ast.name: warn
ast.source: media|source.src was changed by a third party - skip cleanup
ast.target: media|source.src 被第三方更改 - 跳过清理

ast.name: warn
ast.target: 执行 block-audio 操作时出错

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Could not generate manifest CMCD data.
ast.target: 无法生成清单 CMCD 数据。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Could not generate segment CMCD data.
ast.target: 无法生成片段 CMCD 数据。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Could not renew expired session. Missing pssh initData.
ast.target: 无法续订过期会话。缺少 pssh initData。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Subtitle playlist not aligned with playback
ast.target: 字幕播放列表与播放未对齐

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Trying to nudge playhead over buffer-hole
ast.target: 尝试推动播放头越过缓冲区空洞

ast.name: warn
ast.target: [latency-controller]：检测到卡顿，正在调整目标延迟

ast.name: warn
ast.source: media must be detached before attaching
ast.target: 附加前必须先分离媒体

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Select or open an HTTP video page link first.
ast.target: 请先选择或打开一个 HTTP 视频页面链接。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Select a time like 1:23, 01:23, or 1:02:03 first.

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 没有活动字幕可供比较。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Select your typed text in the editor first.
ast.target: 请先在编辑器中选择您输入的文本。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: yt-dlp direct URL resolving is only available on desktop.
ast.target: yt-dlp 直接 URL 解析仅在桌面端可用。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Bilibili uses the existing experimental Bilibili direct playback setting.
ast.target: Bilibili 使用现有的实验性 Bilibili 直接播放设置。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Node child_process is unavailable in this Obsidian environment.
ast.target: 在此 Obsidian 环境中，Node child_process 不可用。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 正在使用 yt-dlp 解析直接 URL...

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Requested yt-dlp format was unavailable. Retrying with automatic format discovery...
ast.target: 请求的 yt-dlp 格式不可用。正在使用自动格式发现重试...

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Direct URL saved to the vault sync map.
ast.target: 直接 URL 已保存到保险库同步映射。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No subtitle cues were detected in that file.
ast.target: 在该文件中未检测到字幕提示。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 移动端时间戳轨道已禁用。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 移动端时间戳轨道已启用。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No voice recording is currently running.
ast.target: 当前没有正在运行的录音。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Cannot access system file. It may be outside the vault or inaccessible.
ast.target: 无法访问系统文件。它可能位于保险库之外或无法访问。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 正在移动端外部打开 YouTube。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Bilibili direct playback enabled for this video.
ast.target: 已为此视频启用 Bilibili 直接播放。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Bilibili direct playback failed. Falling back to embedded player.
ast.target: Bilibili 直接播放失败。正在回退到嵌入式播放器。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Direct URL playback failed. Marking this cached URL invalid and falling back.
ast.target: 直接 URL 播放失败。正在将此缓存 URL 标记为无效并回退。

ast.name: error
ast.source: No playable videos or episodes found in this feed.
ast.target: 在此订阅源中未找到可播放的视频或剧集。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Failed to load podcast feed. The server may block cross-origin requests.
ast.target: 加载播客订阅源失败。服务器可能阻止了跨域请求。

ast.name: label
ast.source: Cached direct URL is YouTube HLS and cannot play in Obsidian
ast.target: 缓存的直接 URL 是 YouTube HLS 格式，无法在 Obsidian 中播放

ast.name: label
ast.source: Cached direct URL is audio-only; refresh to resolve a video stream
ast.target: 缓存的直接 URL 为纯音频；请刷新以获取视频流

ast.name: name
ast.target: 协调已保存的媒体集合

ast.name: name
ast.target: 协调已同步的字幕索引

ast.name: name
ast.target: 使用 yt-dlp 解析直接 URL

ast.name: name
ast.target: 切换移动端时间戳轨道

ast.name: name
ast.source: Toggle mobile timestamp rail edit mode
ast.target: 切换移动端时间戳轨道编辑模式

ast.name: name
ast.source: Open media player (copy url or path and use hotkey)
ast.target: 打开媒体播放器（复制 URL 或路径并使用快捷键）

ast.name: name
ast.source: Insert timestamp based on videos current play time
ast.target: 根据视频当前播放时间插入时间戳

ast.name: name
ast.source: Convert selected time text to timestamp block
ast.target: 将选中的时间文本转换为时间戳块

ast.name: name
ast.source: Import subtitle file for current media
ast.target: 为当前媒体导入字幕文件

ast.name: name
ast.target: 插入带时间戳的当前字幕

ast.name: name
ast.source: Stop voice recording and save note
ast.target: 停止语音录制并保存笔记

ast.name: name
ast.source: Reveal dictation answer (compare with selected text)
ast.target: 显示听写答案（与选中文本比较）

ast.name: text
ast.source: Media, subtitles, feeds, and vault files
ast.target: 媒体、字幕、订阅源和库文件

ast.name: text
ast.source: Open a timestamp-url block or media file once, and it will appear here for quick access.
ast.target: 打开一个时间戳 URL 块或媒体文件一次，它就会出现在这里以便快速访问。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No synced subtitle files found yet. Import subtitles while a media item is open to manage them here.
ast.target: 尚未找到已同步的字幕文件。在媒体项目打开时导入字幕，即可在此处管理它们。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Add RSS feed URLs in plugin settings to see them here.
ast.target: 在插件设置中添加 RSS 订阅源 URL，即可在此处查看。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No playable items found in this feed.
ast.target: 在此订阅源中未找到可播放的项目。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Add vault folders or Windows folder paths in plugin settings to browse local audio and video here.
ast.target: 在插件设置中添加库文件夹或 Windows 文件夹路径，即可在此处浏览本地音频和视频。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No media files found in this folder.
ast.target: 在此文件夹中未找到媒体文件。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No timestamp blocks found in this note.
ast.target: 在此笔记中未找到时间戳块。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Open a media file first, or select a playable URL in the editor before importing subtitles.
ast.target: 请先打开一个媒体文件，或在编辑器中选择一个可播放的 URL，然后再导入字幕。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Choose a .srt or .vtt file. Smart Media Notes will save a renamed copy in your vault subtitle folder.
ast.target: 选择一个 .srt 或 .vtt 文件。智能媒体笔记将在您的库字幕文件夹中保存一个重命名的副本。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Reconcile saved media and synced subtitle index
ast.target: 协调已保存的媒体和已同步的字幕索引

ast.name: title
ast.source: Resolve this link with yt-dlp on desktop
ast.target: 在桌面端使用 yt-dlp 解析此链接
